sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Fiorentina has struggled in their last 5 matches, failing to win any (4 losses, 1 draw) and conceding in all games. Bologna, on the other hand, shows better form with 2 wins, 2 draws, and 1 loss, demonstrating a more balanced performance. This suggests Bologna might have the upper hand going into the match.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters, Bologna has dominated Fiorentina, winning both matches (1-0 and 2-0) without conceding a goal. This historical advantage could play a psychological role in today's match.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Both teams have similar offensive output with 54 goals scored this season, ranking them 6th and 7th respectively. However, Bologna's slightly better league position (7th, 62 points) compared to Fiorentina (9th, 59 points) and fewer goals conceded (41 vs 37) indicate a marginally stronger defensive structure.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Fiorentina's attack relies heavily on Moise Kean (17 goals), but they have several missing players which could impact depth. Bologna's Riccardo Orsolini (13 goals) is a standout threat, and despite a couple of absences, their squad appears more stable.

sections.subtitle: Match Dynamics
sections.text: Fiorentina's recent trend of high-scoring games (6/7 over 2.5 goals) contrasts with Bologna's tendency for lower-scoring matches (6/8 under 2.5 goals). Given head-to-head history and current form, a tight game is likely with Bologna potentially edging it.
